context: Tests the testify→tasks pipeline segment with a TDD-mandatory constitution. Validates that .feature files are generated with proper traceability tags before tasks are created, that every implementation task in user story phases references TS-XXX IDs, that test setup tasks precede production code tasks within each phase, and that assertion integrity is maintained (test scenarios match spec acceptance criteria, not invented).

checklist.name: .feature files cover all FRs
checklist.description: Generated .feature files collectively have @FR-XXX tags covering all 10 functional requirements (FR-001 through FR-010). No functional requirement is left without a test scenario

checklist.name: DO NOT MODIFY headers present
checklist.description: Every .feature file starts with the DO NOT MODIFY header comment block

checklist.name: All required tags on every Scenario
checklist.description: Every Scenario has @TS-XXX (unique ID), @FR-XXX (requirement), @US-XXX (user story), priority (@P1 or @P2), and test type (@acceptance, @contract, or @validation)

checklist.name: TS-XXX IDs unique across all files
checklist.description: No duplicate @TS-XXX tags exist across all .feature files

checklist.name: Scenarios match spec acceptance criteria
checklist.description: Generated Gherkin scenarios correspond to the acceptance scenarios in spec.md — not invented test cases that go beyond what the spec describes. The concurrent booking scenario (US-1 scenario 3) must be present

checklist.name: Privacy/auth scenario present
checklist.description: At least one .feature scenario tests the cross-provider access restriction (FR-010: Dr. Jones cannot view Dr. Smith's schedule → 403 error)

checklist.name: Every story task references TS-XXX
checklist.description: In tasks.md, every task within user story phases (not Setup or Foundational) includes at least one TS-XXX reference, since the constitution mandates TDD and every implementation task MUST reference the test scenario(s) it satisfies

checklist.name: TS references are comma-separated
checklist.description: Multiple TS references in tasks use comma-separated format [TS-001, TS-002] — not prose ranges like 'TS-001 through TS-003'

checklist.name: Test tasks before production tasks per story
checklist.description: Within each user story phase, tasks for test infrastructure (step definitions, test fixtures, integration test setup) appear before or interleaved with production code tasks — not all production code first with tests at the end

checklist.name: Task file paths match plan structure
checklist.description: Task descriptions reference file paths from the plan's Project Structure (e.g., internal/service/booking_service.go, internal/handler/booking_handler.go). No invented paths

checklist.name: Phase structure and sequential IDs
checklist.description: tasks.md has Setup → Foundational → User Story (P1 before P2) → Polish phases, with sequential T001, T002, T003... IDs

checklist.name: Concurrency test scenario present
checklist.description: A .feature scenario exists that tests concurrent slot booking (the spec's third acceptance scenario for US-1), and a corresponding task references it
